ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT($Setup.GlobalSetting__c.Ignore_Validation__c)&& ( (RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Model_C' && TEXT( Deliver_Plant__c )='5070' && Text(Customer_Sales_Info__r.Payment_method__c) <> 'YPF') || (RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Model_C' && TEXT( Deliver_Plant__c )<>'5070' && Text(Customer_Sales_Info__r.Payment_method__c) = 'YPF') ) && $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator' && $Profile.Name <> 'Interface Profile' && !SAP_Order__c
ValidationRule.errorMessage: YPF customer can only create the order that the Sales Org is '5070' and the record type is 'Model C'.
